rationale: No new regional security developments near Romania; Iran deal continuation keeps energy price uncertainty as the main indirect concern.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump claims Sunday signing, Tehran disputes
top_events.summary: A resolved Iran deal could reduce energy costs for Romanian consumers, but conflicting signals mean no change yet to the economic outlook.

top_events.title: UK seizes Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: Enforcement action against Russia's shadow fleet is relevant to Black Sea security context and sanctions effectiveness, a mild positive signal for Romania.

top_events.title: Gold price trending down
top_events.summary: Falling gold prices reflect shifting global risk appetite; minor indirect signal for Romanian financial markets and savings.
